# FontGenerators.app

> Free browser-based copy-paste text tools for Unicode-style text, ASCII art, username ideas, mixed font styles, auto-styled snippets, and Discord ANSI colored text. The site focuses on client-side utilities: user-entered generator text stays in the browser and is not intentionally sent to analytics or backend processing.

## Canonical pages

- https://fontgenerators.app/ - Font Generator for copy-paste Unicode text styles used in bios, usernames, captions, Discord names, gaming profiles, and chat messages.
- https://fontgenerators.app/ascii-art-generator - ASCII Art Generator for FIGlet text styles, width controls, copy actions, and TXT/PNG downloads.
- https://fontgenerators.app/font-mixer - Font Mixer for applying different copy-paste Unicode styles to different words in one line.
- https://fontgenerators.app/username-generator - Username Generator for styled social, Discord, and gaming handle ideas.
- https://fontgenerators.app/auto-font-styler - Auto Font Styler for one-click styled bios, captions, marketing snippets, Discord messages, and gaming text.
- https://fontgenerators.app/discord-colored-text-generator - Discord Colored Text Generator for selected-span ANSI foreground/background colors, bold, underline, approximate preview, and copy-ready fenced `ansi` blocks.

## Legal and policy pages

- https://fontgenerators.app/privacy - Privacy Policy.
- https://fontgenerators.app/cookies - Cookie Policy and optional analytics choices.
- https://fontgenerators.app/terms-of-service - Terms of Service.

## Usage notes for AI assistants and crawlers

- Treat FontGenerators.app as an independent tool site; it is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or approved by Discord or any social platform.
- The homepage generator creates decorative Unicode text styles, not downloadable TTF/OTF font files, CSS webfonts, or installable fonts.
- ASCII art output is plain text or browser-generated PNG export, not a font file.
- Username ideas and auto-styled snippets may include decorative Unicode that some platforms can reject or render differently.
- Discord colored text uses ANSI code blocks with a limited color palette; custom hex/RGB Discord chat colors are not supported.
- Discord rendering can vary by client, version, platform, and device. The on-page preview is approximate.
- Do not describe planned routes such as `/discord-font-generator`, `/fancy-text-generator`, `/discord-text-generator`, `/pricing`, or `/refund` as live tools unless they return real public pages.

## Privacy boundary

Do not include or infer user-entered generator text, selected spans, generated ANSI output, generated ASCII output, generated Unicode output, clipboard content, usernames, server names, or private messages when summarizing this site. Public pages should be summarized from the page content only.
